task4_quantityTrace.firstStage: Pass C structured extraction (v28 API output)
task4_quantityTrace.mechanism: GPT misread Qtd 1,35 as 1,05 (digit substitution); not from description 1,5kg pack metadata

task5_unitPriceTrace.firstStage: Pass C structured extraction (v28 API output)
task5_unitPriceTrace.mechanism: GPT emitted legacy unit_price 10.88 with gross_unit_price/discount_pct null; value matches no PDF column (not gross 12.90, not net 9.95, not OCR 9.82)

details: Prompt mandates gross_unit_price from Preço Unit and discount_pct from Desc.(%) — Gorgonzola example shows qty 1.35, gross 12.90, discount 22.85, line_total_net 13.44
Model returned pre-filled unit_price 10.88 with discount columns null/stripped — bypasses deriveNetUnitPrice
line_total_net 13.44 likely copied correctly from Preço Total (VALOR isolation worked for total only)
task6_promptAudit.promptExampleLine: Emporio — Gorgonzola DOP Dolce with Qtd 1,35, Preço Unit 12,90 €, Desc.(%) 22,85, Preço Total 13,44 €

task8_failureMechanism.category: Pass C GPT structured extraction — dual field hallucination
steps: 1. PDF row arithmetically consistent: 1.35 kg × €12.90 gross × (1−22.85%) = €13.44
2. Pass C crop + prompt delivered correct column semantics; total isolation succeeded (line_total_net=13.44)
3. GPT misread quantity 1,35 → 1.05 and invented unit_price 10.88 instead of populating gross_unit_price=12.90 + discount_pct=22.85
4. parseMonetaryLineItems accepted legacy unit_price; bindMonetaryColumns pass-through (discount cols null; total > qty×unit_price so applyEffectivePaidPrice skipped)
5. normalizeInvoiceItemFields and persistence insert copied API output losslessly to DB

final.where105FirstAppears: Pass C structured extraction — first full artifact: .tmp/final-stability-audit/extracts/17aa3591-run1.json (qty 1.05, unit_price 9.88); persisted trio qty 1.05 + unit_price 10.88 first together at v28 deploy replay ≡ DB

final.exactExtractionFailure: GPT Pass C returned quantity=1.05 and unit_price=10.88 with discount columns absent while line_total_net=13.44 correct; downstream binding/normalization/persistence pass through unchanged
